commit.message:
8384941: AArch64: Use stlr for standalone release stores

C2 lowers setRelease / putXRelease / putOrdered* on aarch64 to a leading
dmb ish followed by a plain str. The release ordering can be provided
by stlr on its own, so the dmb is redundant.

Match the pattern in the aarch64 backend: when MemBarRelease is
standalone and its memory chain reaches a release store with no
trailing membar, elide the dmb and emit stlr for the store. The
constructor-exit MemBarRelease used for final-field publication is
left alone because its preceding stores are MO=unordered. Gated by
UseStlrForStandaloneRelease (default off).

Co-authored-by: xiejf2020 <xiejf2020@outlook.com>
